title: selaginella eublepharis
intro: Selaginella eublepharis, also known as the "tall leaved resurrection fern" due to its ability to revive itself after drying, is a type of non-vascular plant belonging to the genus Selaginella. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant are attributed to its ability to boost the immune system, improve cardiovascular health, and even help in reducing stress and anxiety. The herbal preparation of Selaginella eublepharis is often made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
